_comment: Spot Circle minimap mod - configuration. Place this file at one of: mods/configs/wot_spot_mod.json | res_mods/configs/wot_spot_mod.json | mods/wot_spot_mod.json (relative to game root). Press the reloadKey in-battle to hot-reload, or restart battle to apply changes.
_comment_view_mode: If true, use the player's own view range as the assumed enemy VR (most accurate when you and the enemy run similar tanks). If false, use enemyViewRangeFallback. Note: VR above 445m is allowed and gives buffer against camo, even though physical spotting caps at 445m.
_comment_crew: Approximate crew Camouflage skill multiplicative bonus. 1.05 = ~5% which roughly matches a 100% trained commander+driver+gunner with full Camo skill on a typical TD/light. Set to 1.0 to ignore crew bonus.
_comment_color: Circle colors as RGB int. 16737095 = 0xFF6347 (tomato), 3329330 = 0x32CD32 (lime), 16753920 = 0xFFA500 (orange), 2263842 = 0x228B22 (forest green for camo-net active).
_comment_perf: How often to recompute (seconds), and the speed (m/s) above which counts as moving.
_comment_fire: After firing, camo is multiplied by gun's invisibilityFactorAtShot for fireRevealDuration seconds. Disable applyFirePenalty if you want to ignore this. The 3.0s default matches WoT's typical reveal window for tank guns.
_comment_camo_net: Camouflage net (StillVehicleOptionalDevice with activateWhenStillSec=3.0 in artefacts.py) activates after 3s of NOT MOVING and adds a fixed bonus to invisibility. Mod auto-detects the device on the player's tank and reads the bonus from its descriptor; if reading fails, falls back to camoNetFallbackBonus (0.05 = +5%, typical tier I camo net).
_comment_picker: Picker lets you cycle through enemy tanks and adjust the spot circle to that specific enemy's view range (decoded from their vehicle descriptor server-sent at battle start). Hotkeys are Keys.* names. PgDown/PgUp cycle, Home clears, Delete toggles 'rations' bonus (~+10% VR), End toggles 'crew perks' bonus (~+10% VR; BIA + Recon + SitAware combined). Defaults assume enemy has neither - flip toggles to model worst-case spotters. The marker dot ('● ') appears next to the picked enemy's name on natural panel redraws (HP change, death, etc.).
_comment_picker_stereo: If the picked enemy has Stereoscope (binoculars) equipped, mod auto-applies its VR factor (read from descriptor; in-game ~1.25x). Conservative worst-case assumption - assume binos always active. pickerStereoscopeFallback used only when descriptor read fails despite the device being equipped.
_comment_hotkey: Reload config without restarting battle. Use a Keys.* constant name (KEY_F8, KEY_F7, etc.). Set to empty string to disable.
_comment_debug: Set true to log camo/radius/state each tick to python.log.
